title: NeGD Notification 2026 - Apply Online for Senior AI/ML Engineer Posts
description: The National e-Governance Division (NeGD) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 01 Senior AI/ML Engineer Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their B.E./B. Tech, M.E./M. Tech in Computer Science Engineering, Ph.D., can apply for the NeGD Notification 2026. The interested applicants can apply in online mode. Here we have mentioned the education ...
